title: Run Linux on Windows Like a Pro — No Dual Boot, No VM!
excerpt: Have you ever wanted to run Linux on your Windows machine but didn’t want the hassle of dual-booting or setting up a virtual machine? Thanks to Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL), you can now install and run a full-fledged Linux environment right inside Windows

title: Is Django Still Relevant in 2025? The Pros and Cons of Python’s Top Web Framework
excerpt: Django remains one of Python’s most powerful and reliable web frameworks, continuously proving its relevance in modern web development. Known for its secure, scalable, and maintainable architecture, Django excels in rapidly building robust applications with built-in support for authentication, ORM, and an extensive ecosystem of reusable components
